signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh to Succeed Jerome Powell as Fed Chair; Powell to Stay Until Confirmed** | **NO** | **HIGH**
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh to Succeed Jerome Powell as Fed Chair; Powell to Stay Until Confirmed** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[2][3]

Powell confirmed on April 21, 2026, he will hold the Fed chair position until his successor is Senate-confirmed and an ongoing criminal investigation into the Fed is resolved, citing legal provisions for continued service[1][3].
